Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x59ED "MARBLELOGIC-59ED" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Marble Logic (Unreal - 2006).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Starts at $59ED instead of $59D8 so as to skip the high score loading from disk. Also removed the call to the kernal save routine ($FFD8) at $6CB0 to remove high score saving to disk.
